content: build me a website about how cool dogs are
I'll have the team build a fun, visually appealing static website about dogs — with sections on why they're awesome, some cute facts, and a nice layout.

@Coder # Project Plan: "Why Dogs Are Cool"

## Restatement
Build a single-page static website titled "Why Dogs Are Cool" with a hero section, content sections covering loyalty, fun facts, and famous dogs, nice typography, a warm color palette, and responsive design. No external dependencies.

## Project Type
`type: static`

## File Plan

- `index.html` - Main page with semantic HTML structure, hero section, content sections (Loyal Companions, Fun Facts, Famous Dogs), warm color palette, responsive layout, and embedded CSS + JS
- `style.css` - Styles for typography, warm color palette, responsive breakpoints, and layout
- `script.js` - Any interactive elements (scroll animations, etc.)

## Notes for Coder
- Keep everything self-contained in a single HTML file if possible, or split into the three files above
- Use warm colors (oranges, browns, warm yellows)
- Nice typography using system fonts (no external font libraries)
- Responsive design with media queries
- No external dependencies whatsoever

This is a static HTML project (not Python), so there are no automated tests to write. I'll hand off to the Repairer to run the build check, which verifies that index.html is present and the files are non-empty.

@Repairer please run these.
